logger.doc:name: Log ApplicationId Message for synchronization
logger.message: #[import try from dw::Runtime output application/java --- "\'Synchronize updates in credit application received from SF Experience API\': " ++ " \'applicationId\': " ++ (vars.appID) ++ " \'correlationId\': " ++ (attributes.properties.correlationId default correlationId) ++ if(p('log.payloadFlag') == 'true' and try(() -> isEmpty(payload)).success) ("\'Payload\': " ++ write(payload,"application/json")) else ""]

flow-ref.doc:name: Flow reference to get application from salesforce
flow-ref.name: get-cedit-app-details-flow

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere" --- if(vars.syncUpdatesCreditApp.note? ) (payload ++ "agentComments": vars.syncUpdatesCreditApp.note) else payload

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: HTTP:CONNECTIVITY, HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, HTTP:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, HTTP:TIMEOUT, HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED

logger.doc:name: Log Message
logger.message: #["Error: " ++ (error.detailedDescription as String) ++ " occured while processing Sync updates in Credit App from MB Advantage SAPI."]

logger.doc:name: Log Message
logger.message: #["Error: " ++ (error.detailedDescription as String) ++ " occured while processing Sync updates in Credit App from MB Advantage SAPI. Moving message to DLQ"]

anypoint-mq:publish.doc:name: Publish Sync updates in Credit App to DLQ
anypoint-mq:publish.anypoint-mq:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "originalPayload": vars.syncUpdatesCreditApp, "errorMessage": error.detailedDescription as String }]
